stemHtml: What is the permissible blood alcohol concentration limit in aviation?

options.a: 0.2 per thousand or more restrictive by the operator when preparing the flight and during flight operations.
options.b: 2 per thousand or more restrictive by the operator excluding preparing the flight and during flight operations.
options.c: 2 per thousand or more restrictive by the operator when preparing the flight and during flight operations.
options.d: 0.2 per thousand or more restrictive by the operator excluding preparing the flight and during flight operations.
